title: malleola glomerata
intro: Malleola glomerata, also known as the purple helmet orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in Ayurvedic medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Malleola glomerata include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Malleola glomerata include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
